inputs.fcf_source: FY2025 operating cash flow $1519.0M less capital spending $507.8M ÷ 147.0M diluted shares per AKAM/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260220_rpt20251231_acc0001086222_26_000022.htm
inputs.normalization_note: FY2025 FCF per share anchors owner cash; Q1 2026 margin compression from compute build-out noted but not normalized out of base.

bear.notes: Compute growth slows; security pricing pressure; multiple stays depressed

base.notes: Compute mix continues; security stabilizes; modest re-rate from buybacks

bull.notes: GPU/cloud infrastructure share gains; margin recovery; premium platform multiple

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Goodwill $3.2B and operating lease ROU $1.47B are on balance sheet at recognized values; no land/NAV misstatement pattern (10-K FY2025)

option_scan.question: Backlog / RPO not in FCF path?
option_scan.evidence: Remaining performance obligation ~$5.2B at FY2025; conversion timing in revenue growth assumptions [Assumption] (10-K FY2025, 10-Q Q1 2026)

option_scan.question: Embedded product option in revenue?
option_scan.evidence: Compute segment $2.24B FY2025 (+10% YoY) already in consolidated revenue; GPU/cloud ramp in segment growth rows

growth_explanation.mechanism: Compute mix shift (+10% FY2025) and RPO conversion; partially offset by Security decline and operating-lease/capex burden
growth_explanation.bear_falsifier: Security revenue declines four consecutive quarters with flat Compute growth
growth_explanation.bull_falsifier: Compute reaches 12%+ growth with operating margin recovery above FY2025 levels

component_valuation.coverage_statement: Four additive components map edge platform owner cash, Compute/GPU option, net financial claims, and cloud competition reserve once each.

components.label: Edge platform owner-cash engine (Compute, Security, Delivery)

valuation.evidence: Primary bridge from AKAM/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260220_rpt20251231_acc0001086222_26_000022.htm: FY2025 revenue $4208.2B, OCF $1519.0M, FCF $1011.2M, cash $930.2M, convertible debt $4140.0M; contract backfill 2026-07-21.
valuation.cross_check: Reconcile to FY2025 10-K and Q1 2026 10-Q before decision use.
valuation.falsifier: Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.

inputs.label: FY2025 net cash provided by operating activities
FY2025 payments to acquire property, plant and equipment

assumptions.label: Normalized owner free cash flow per diluted share
assumptions.rationale: FY2025 operating cash flow less capital spending per diluted share; Q1 2026 margin compression not normalized out of base.

assumptions.label: Growth years 1–5
assumptions.rationale: Lawrence bear/base/bull owner-cash growth from valuation.json.

assumptions.label: Growth years 6–7
assumptions.rationale: Fade after compute mix stabilizes.

assumptions.label: Required return on owner cash
assumptions.rationale: Platform bounds; not the stance gate.

assumptions.label: Selling multiple in year 7
assumptions.rationale: Lawrence exit multiples 18× / 22× / 28× on year-10 cash path.

assumptions.label: Component schedule adjustment factor
assumptions.rationale: Preserves component schedule while filing facts anchor FY2025 FCF per share.

components.label: Compute and GPU/cloud platform upside option

valuation.evidence: Primary bridge from AKAM/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260220_rpt20251231_acc0001086222_26_000022.htm: FY2025 revenue $4208.2B, OCF $1519.0M, FCF $1011.2M, cash $930.2M, convertible debt $4140.0M; contract backfill 2026-07-21.
valuation.cross_check: Reconcile to FY2025 10-K and Q1 2026 10-Q before decision use.
valuation.falsifier: Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.

source.locator: Compute $2.24B FY2025 (+10% YoY); largest solution line

assumptions.label: Risk-adjusted GPU/cloud platform upside beyond normalized FCF
assumptions.rationale: Non-overlapping claim on Compute/GPU mix shift and RPO conversion beyond consolidated owner-cash engine; embedded in revenue growth rows.

components.label: Net cash and convertible debt claims on common equity

valuation.evidence: Primary bridge from AKAM/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260220_rpt20251231_acc0001086222_26_000022.htm: FY2025 revenue $4208.2B, OCF $1519.0M, FCF $1011.2M, cash $930.2M, convertible debt $4140.0M; contract backfill 2026-07-21.
valuation.cross_check: Reconcile to FY2025 10-K and Q1 2026 10-Q before decision use.
valuation.falsifier: Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.

assumptions.label: Cash required for network operations and working capital
assumptions.rationale: Judgment on non-distributable operating liquidity for global edge network.

assumptions.label: Net financial claim on common equity after convertible debt and operating minimum
assumptions.rationale: Filing-locked cash less convertible notes; low stresses full debt at face value.

components.label: Cloud price competition and Security share-loss stress reserve

valuation.evidence: Primary bridge from AKAM/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260220_rpt20251231_acc0001086222_26_000022.htm: FY2025 revenue $4208.2B, OCF $1519.0M, FCF $1011.2M, cash $930.2M, convertible debt $4140.0M; contract backfill 2026-07-21.
valuation.cross_check: Reconcile to FY2025 10-K and Q1 2026 10-Q before decision use.
valuation.falsifier: Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.

source.locator: Operating income $114M Q1 2026 (-26% YoY) on higher cost of revenue

assumptions.label: Cloud price competition and Security share-loss stress reserve
assumptions.rationale: Negative reserve for hyperscaler/Cloudflare pricing pressure and margin compression not fully embedded in core owner-cash capitalization.

trigger.policy: A complete economic-value analysis is required when any trigger fires; otherwise it is recommended.

economic_claim.description: One diluted share of AKAM, including edge platform owner cash, Compute/GPU upside, net financial claims, and cloud competition reserve.
economic_claim.enterprise_to_equity_reconciliation: Consolidated platform engine valued through owner-cash discount on FY2025 FCF per share; Compute option, net liquidity, and competition reserve are separate overlap keys.

economic_value_analysis.accounting_reference: FY2025 10-K: stockholders' equity ~$4.98B; economic value in normalized owner cash ($6.8789/sh), not GAAP book alone.

component_groups.label: Edge platform owner-cash engine
component_groups.economic_claim: Compute, Security, and Delivery normalized free cash flow
component_groups.valuation_basis: Owner-cash discount on FY2025 FCF per diluted share.
component_groups.adjustments: Q1 2026 margin compression noted; not normalized out of base.

component_groups.label: Compute and GPU/cloud platform upside option
component_groups.economic_claim: Incremental GPU/cloud monetization beyond normalized FCF
component_groups.valuation_basis: Risk-adjusted milestone value on Compute mix shift and RPO.
component_groups.adjustments: Not in Lawrence base FCF path; Compute +10% FY2025 supports base band.

risk_and_timing.probability_basis: Base ~40% that Compute sustains high-single-digit growth with margin recovery.
risk_and_timing.timing_basis: RPO ~$5.2B converts over multi-year contracts per FY2025 10-K.
risk_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: Operating-lease and capex wave for compute build-out in proof judgment band.

component_groups.label: Net cash and convertible debt claims on common equity
component_groups.economic_claim: Net corporate liquidity after convertible notes and operating minimum
component_groups.valuation_basis: Net asset value on filing-locked cash less convertible debt.
component_groups.adjustments: Convertible notes at principal; no equity credit in base case.

component_groups.label: Cloud price competition and Security share-loss stress reserve
component_groups.economic_claim: Hyperscaler/Cloudflare pricing and Security erosion stress
component_groups.valuation_basis: Bounded negative reserve; not full enterprise value haircut.
component_groups.adjustments: Partial dhando: cloud price war could compress FCF faster than low growth scenario.

limitations: Segment-level FCF not separately disclosed; consolidated engine with Compute option overlay.
Convertible note equity conversion and competition reserve bands are judgment.

paths.label: Growth theory (pre-falsifier)
paths.weight_why: Segment blend before falsifier pass; diagnostic only when it differs from falsifier-adjusted.
weight_falsifiers: Included at full weight alongside falsifier-adjusted without divergence note

paths.label: Bear scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Downside stress; low weight because bear is a sensitivity, not a competing explanation of base mechanics.
weight_falsifiers: Bear assumptions become base case in filings (e.g. sustained volume collapse)
paths.hard_to_vary: yes: asymmetric low weight is structural

paths.label: Bull scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Upside stress probe; higher than bear because optionality archetype has skew, but still below primary paths.
weight_falsifiers: Bull growth sustained in filings for 4+ quarters without falsifier trigger

qualitative_adjustments.factor: No dated predictive attribute at spot
qualitative_adjustments.rationale: Scarcity is descriptive; no timed mispricing catalyst in base
qualitative_adjustments.falsifier: Cross-check names dated catalyst with timeline

deutsch_checks.reach: Weights encode evidence tier (A primary → D external), not fitted to hit a target IRR

synthesis.notes: Capstone IRR combining filings, segments, overlays, third-party, qualitative

top_dissents.label: Murray Stahl
top_dissents.falsifier: No asset intensity / pricing power (moat eroding + non-croupier)

top_dissents.label: Horizon Kinetics
top_dissents.falsifier: No dated contractual payoff or royalty/trust structure

lens_consensus.disclaimer: Advisory lens blend only. Does not replace Lawrence total-synthesis stance gate without [HUMAN REVIEW].

context_overlay.disclaimer: Context only. Tailwinds inform stance and overlay sizing; they do not auto-inflate Lawrence base IRR. Promotion to base case requires [HUMAN REVIEW].

insider_signal.disclaimer: Context only. Insider activity informs scenario confidence and stance discussion; it does not auto-inflate Lawrence base IRR. Promotion requires [HUMAN REVIEW].

scenario_confidence.note: Scenario weights are qualitative confidence only; Lawrence base IRR unchanged.

total_return_panel.error: Vendor events are discovery evidence; primary-source completeness has not been established.
total_return_panel.return_contract: split-adjusted close excluding dividends; event amounts normalized for later splits; cash reinvested at ex-date close; pre-tax nominal

coverage.note: Vendor events are discovery evidence; primary-source completeness has not been established.

component_review_queue.decision_rule: Each assigned rater records accept, challenge, or reject with a proposed range and evidence. The aggregator may not silently average disputed ranges.

items.label: Edge platform owner-cash engine (Compute, Security, Delivery)
mandatory_checks: Is the valuation method appropriate for this economic claim?
Is the security's ownership claim and economic-unit denominator reconciled correctly?
Does the evidence support the low/base/high range and its timing?
Are comparable assets truly like-for-like after production, contract, location, capital, ownership, and realization adjustments?
For an option, are success probability, time to realization, and remaining owner-funded capital explicit?
Is the component additive, or already embedded in another component?
What observation would move the base estimate materially?

valuation_method_route.label: High-return compounder
failure_modes: growth projected without its capital cost
terminal value unsupported by a durable mechanism
valuation_method_route.decision_rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

method_route.label: High-return compounder
failure_modes: growth projected without its capital cost
terminal value unsupported by a durable mechanism
method_route.decision_rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

valuation.interpretation: value_per_share is withheld while any material additive component is unpriced; priced_components_per_share is not a complete security value.

scenario_contract.rule: Cases must change cited causal operating, capital, probability, timing, or financing drivers—not only a terminal multiple.

change_control.rule: A source fact is locked. Every assumption change requires a reason, author, timestamp, and before/after value.

universal_valuation_contract.decision_rule: No security is decision-grade until every material claim is valued exactly once by a valid calculation proof and every material evidence blocker is resolved.
